title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you enjoy going to museums or art galleries? Why?
Is there a local cultural tradition or festival that you enjoy?
Do you think arts and culture are well supported in your country?
What book, film or song has made the biggest impression on you? Why?
How often do you visit cultural places or events in your city?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Is there a piece of music, art or literature that has changed the way you see the world?
Do you think it's important for young people to be exposed to classical art and culture?
Should museums be free for everyone? Why or why not?
